economic_notes: Multiple business entities including Dunne-za Ventures LP, Black Diamond Cygnus LP, West Moberly First Nations Investments Inc., WM Indigiinet Internet Service Inc., Papawewin Developments LP, Six Nations Ventures, EBA Developments LP, Twin Sisters Native Plants Nursery LP, and West Moberly First Nation Holdings Inc. COVID-19 declared as subsequent event with unknown impact on operations.
notes: Fiscal year is 2020 not 2024. Three entities consolidated (West Moberly First Nation Holdings Inc., 09244996 B.C. Ltd., West Moberly First Nations Agricultural Benefits Settlement Trust); nine entities accounted for by modified equity method. The statement of financial activities shows annual surplus of -1,760,186 (including amortization) but the change in net financial assets statement shows excess of revenues over expenditures of -961,921 which reflects the consolidated entity including equity earnings. Total expenditures per Schedule 4 (expenditures by object) are 12,739,036 which differs from Schedule 3 program total of 12,210,405 due to amortization inclusion. Treaty loan payable of $3,278,585 to ISC is interest-free unless in default, repayable by March 31, 2022. COVID-19 noted as subsequent event. No remuneration schedule included in the statements provided. annual_debt_service calculated as capital lease repayment $40,233 plus long-term liabilities repaid $314,178 = $354,411. expenses_enterprises covers West Moberly First Nation Holdings Inc. $572,026 and 0944996 BC Ltd Golf Course $334,291.
